title.en: China-to-Brazil Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical electromedical device documentation against Brazil ANVISA RDC 751/2022 classification (Classes I–IV), registro vs notificação pathways, Brazilian GMP (B-GMP, RDC 665/2022), INMETRO electromedical certification (ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1), clinical/safety evidence requirements, Brazilian Registration Holder (BRH) obligations, and Portuguese-language labelling and UDI/traceability requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床电医疗器械文件与巴西ANVISA RDC 751/2022分类（I–IV类）、registro与notificação路径、巴西GMP（B-GMP，RDC 665/2022）、INMETRO电医疗认证（ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1）、临床/安全证据要求、巴西注册持有人（BRH）义务以及葡萄牙语标签和UDI/可追溯性要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床電醫療器材文件與巴西ANVISA RDC 751/2022分類（I–IV類）、registro與notificação路徑、巴西GMP（B-GMP，RDC 665/2022）、INMETRO電醫療認證（ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1）、臨床/安全證據要求、巴西註冊持有人（BRH）義務以及葡萄牙語標籤和UDI/可追溯性要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANVISA registration assessment, Brazilian GMP audit result, INMETRO certification determination, clinical evaluation, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, manufacturers, and Brazilian Registration Holders should verify current ANVISA classification, registration pathway, B-GMP, INMETRO certification, clinical evidence, labelling, traceability, and BRH obligations with qualified Brazilian regulatory affairs professionals and legal counsel before shipment or placing on the Brazilian market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANVISA注册评估、巴西GMP审核结果、INMETRO认证判定、临床评价、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、制造商及巴西注册持有人在向巴西市场出货或投放产品前，应与有资质的巴西法规事务专业人员及法律顾问核验现行ANVISA分类、注册路径、B-GMP、INMETRO认证、临床证据、标签、可追溯性及BRH义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANVISA註冊評估、巴西GMP審核結果、INMETRO認證判定、臨床評價、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、製造商及巴西註冊持有人在向巴西市場出貨或投放產品前，應與有資質的巴西法規事務專業人員及法律顧問核驗現行ANVISA分類、註冊路徑、B-GMP、INMETRO認證、臨床證據、標籤、可追溯性及BRH義務。

answer_first.en: Brazil requires ANVISA registration or notification (RDC 751/2022 Classes I–IV), Brazilian GMP certification (B-GMP, mandatory for Class III/IV), INMETRO electromedical certification (ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1), a Brazil-incorporated Registration Holder (BRH), and Portuguese-language labelling — none of which are satisfied by NMPA registration alone.
answer_first.zh: 巴西要求ANVISA注册或备案（RDC 751/2022 I–IV类）、巴西GMP认证（B-GMP，III/IV类强制）、INMETRO电医疗认证（ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1）、在巴西注册的注册持有人（BRH）以及葡萄牙语标签——上述要求均无法仅凭NMPA注册满足。
answer_first.zht: 巴西要求ANVISA註冊或備案（RDC 751/2022 I–IV類）、巴西GMP認證（B-GMP，III/IV類強制）、INMETRO電醫療認證（ABNT NBR IEC 60601-1）、在巴西註冊的註冊持有人（BRH）以及葡萄牙語標籤——上述要求均無法僅憑NMPA註冊滿足。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (gov.br/anvisa, inmetro.gov.br, abnt.org.br). Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
